# Risk Register (RAID Log) — [Project Name]

Track all **R**isks, **A**ssumptions, **I**ssues, and **D**ependencies in one place. Review and update this log at every weekly sync.

---

## Risks

A risk is an uncertain event that *may* negatively affect the project if it occurs.

| ID | Description | Category | Impact | Likelihood | Risk Score | Owner | Mitigation Plan | Contingency Plan | Status | Last Updated |
|----|-------------|----------|--------|-----------|------------|-------|-----------------|------------------|--------|--------------|
| R-001 | <!-- Description --> | Technical / People / External / Process | High / Med / Low | High / Med / Low | <!-- H×H=Critical, etc. --> | @username | <!-- Actions to reduce likelihood or impact --> | <!-- Actions if risk occurs --> | Open / Mitigated / Closed | YYYY-MM-DD |
| R-002 | | | | | | | | | | |

### Risk Score Guide

| Likelihood ↓ / Impact → | Low | Medium | High |
|---|---|---|---|
| **High** | Medium | High | Critical |
| **Medium** | Low | Medium | High |
| **Low** | Low | Low | Medium |

---

## Assumptions

An assumption is something believed to be true that has not been formally confirmed. If an assumption turns out to be false it becomes an issue.

| ID | Assumption | Owner | Validation Method | Validation Date | Status |
|----|-----------|-------|-------------------|-----------------|--------|
| A-001 | <!-- What is assumed to be true? --> | @username | <!-- How will this be validated? --> | YYYY-MM-DD | Unvalidated / Confirmed / False |
| A-002 | | | | | |

---

## Issues

An issue is a problem that has *already* occurred and requires action.

| ID | Description | Impact | Owner | Action Plan | Due Date | Status |
|----|-------------|--------|-------|-------------|----------|--------|
| I-001 | <!-- What happened? --> | High / Med / Low | @username | <!-- Steps to resolve --> | YYYY-MM-DD | Open / In Progress / Resolved |
| I-002 | | | | | | |

---

## Dependencies

A dependency is a condition, deliverable, or decision that the project relies on from an external team or system.

| ID | Description | Type | External Owner | Internal Owner | Due Date | Status |
|----|-------------|------|---------------|----------------|----------|--------|
| D-001 | <!-- What is needed and from whom? --> | Upstream / Downstream / Milestone | Team / @username | @username | YYYY-MM-DD | Pending / On Track / At Risk / Complete |
| D-002 | | | | | | |

---

## Review History

| Review Date | Reviewed By | Summary of Changes |
|-------------|-------------|-------------------|
| YYYY-MM-DD | @username | Initial log created |
| | | |
